rationale: El Niño confirmation is directly relevant to Portugal given elevated wildfire and drought risk in Iberia; this is a qualitative new development that raises the seasonal threat level meaningfully for a Portuguese resident.

top_events.title: El Niño under way, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Scientists confirm El Niño is active; for Portugal this directly raises the risk of severe drought, heatwaves, and wildfires during the upcoming fire season in Iberia.

top_events.title: Four days of extreme rain killed 7% of world's rarest orangutans
top_events.summary: Extreme rainfall event in Indonesia; illustrates intensifying climate extremes globally, background signal for Portuguese climate awareness but no direct local impact.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight migrant journeys
top_events.summary: Pope's visit to the Canary Islands draws attention to Atlantic migration routes; has some relevance to Portugal given shared Atlantic migration corridor concerns.
